summary: Audit Log — batch sign-off workflow for compliance officer
description_md:
As a compliance-officer, I want to batch review and sign-off multiple audit log exports across tenants so that I can efficiently complete periodic compliance certifications.

## Background

During quarterly compliance reviews, compliance officers must validate audit log exports from multiple tenants. Currently, each log requires individual review and manual sign-off tracking, creating significant administrative overhead.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Compliance officer can select multiple tenant audit log exports (min 1, max 50) from the batch review interface
2. Selected logs display key metadata: tenant name, export date, record count, and retention period
3. Officer can add a single sign-off comment and digital approval that applies to all selected logs
4. System generates a batch sign-off certificate (PDF) with all signed logs, officer name, timestamp, and unique certificate ID
5. Signed logs are marked as "Certified" in the audit log export history with reference to the certificate
6. Batch sign-off action is recorded in the system audit trail with officer identity and timestamp

comments.author: dev1@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Priority item for Q2 compliance certification cycle. Please coordinate with legal team on certificate format requirements.
